raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Index builder fails due to incorrect project_root resolution when run from archive directory, causing it to scan wrong path and skip all indexed files", "recommended_fix": "Move code_index.py out of archive/ and fix project_root calculation using Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent.parent to ensure correct root detection"}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "code-index.json", "issue": "Index is empty (0 modules, 0 endpoints) despite recent timestamp, creating false confidence in tooling", "recommended_fix": "Rebuild index after moving script from archive and validating path resolution"}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/", "issue": "Archiving a core tool without migration plan violates operational continuity", "recommended_fix": "Establish policy: no archiving of active infrastructure without replacement"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Index integrity directly impacts all agent accuracy — current state invalidates swarm decision-making", "next_files_to_read": ["memory/swarm/code-index.json"]}

findings.issue: Index builder fails due to incorrect project_root resolution when run from archive directory, causing it to scan wrong path and skip all indexed files
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/ and fix project_root calculation using Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent.parent to ensure correct root detection

findings.issue: Index is empty (0 modules, 0 endpoints) despite recent timestamp, creating false confidence in tooling
findings.recommended_fix: Rebuild index after moving script from archive and validating path resolution

findings.issue: Archiving a core tool without migration plan violates operational continuity
findings.recommended_fix: Establish policy: no archiving of active infrastructure without replacement

whistleblower_flag: Index integrity directly impacts all agent accuracy — current state invalidates swarm decision-making
